meta.title: JP Rentals | Steel structure and cladding for industrial projects
meta.description: Design, fabrication, and installation of steel structures, roofs, and cladding for industrial buildings nationwide in Mexico. Grupo NASA.
meta.keywords: steel structure, cladding, KR-18, R101, national coverage, Mexico, industrial building, JP Rentals

hero.headline: Industrial steel and cladding nationwide
hero.sub: We support every project from design through site erection—bringing technical accountability, schedule discipline, and the documentation each client requires. Our work spans warehouses, roofs, façades, and structural upgrades across Mexico.

items.title: Freight roof
items.scope: Supply, fabrication, and erection of the steel frame in the freight area; KR-18 roof deck; R101 wall panels on façade and counter-façade.
items.imageAlt: Coca-Cola Arca Continental: freight roof structure, Monterrey

items.title: Cladding (scaling & packing)
items.scope: Fabrication and erection; KR-18 roof and R101 wall panels.

items.title: CEDIS II — structure & cladding
items.location: WTC La Pila Industrial Park, San Luis Potosí
items.scope: Supply, fabrication, and erection; KR-18 roof and R101 façades.
items.imageAlt: Motomex CEDIS, San Luis Potosí: structure and roof

items.title: Multi-tenant building
items.scope: Fabrication and erection of the multi-tenant warehouse frame.

items.title: Warehouse & mezzanines
items.scope: Erection of the main building, office mezzanines, and Losacero 15 mezzanine decking.

items.title: CEDIS I — structure & cladding
items.location: WTC La Pila Industrial Park, San Luis Potosí
items.scope: Supply, fabrication, and erection; KR-18 roof and R101 façades.
items.imageAlt: Motomex CEDIS I: structure and roof

items.title: Structure
items.body: Assisted design, detailing, fabrication, and erection with QC for warehouses and industry.

items.title: Sheeting & envelope
items.body: Commercial profiles (e.g. KR-18), wall and façade R panels or as per design, closed out on site.

items.title: Strengthening & mezzanines
items.body: Work on existing buildings, mezzanines, Losacero and adjustments with minimal disruption.

footer.description: Steel structures and roof / envelope systems with nationwide execution in Mexico. Grupo NASA.

about.title: Steel and cladding at national scale
about.body1: We deliver projects with business sense, technical precision, and operational discipline. Our approach combines engineering, fabrication, and erection for high-impact work with demanding standards for quality, safety, and schedule.
about.body2: More than contractors, we are a strategic partner for organizations that need solid results on real timelines. That is why industrial companies across Mexico choose JP Rentals for their most critical structural projects.
about.imageAlt: JP Rentals on site for structure and cladding work

group.title: Grupo NASA
group.intro: The same standards for execution, fabrication, and quality control, with complementary capabilities across the group.
group.nasaceroBody: Specialized steel cutting: plasma, laser, oxy-fuel, and guillotine.

process.title: Five stages, one continuous workflow
process.intro: We run an integrated process that covers the full project lifecycle—from engineering and design through final field finishes—with compliance, safety, and quality control at every step.

steps.title: Engineering
steps.body: Every project starts with custom design using Tekla Structures and AutoCAD. Our drawings align with Mexican industry codes and international standards to support safe, buildable execution on site.

bullets.title: Erection drawings
bullets.text: Details for on-site assembly and installation.

steps.imageAlt: Steel frame under erection—engineering and field reference

steps.title: Fabrication
steps.body: Our shop combines advanced equipment with skilled teams to turn steel into durable structures. We use certified materials and controlled processes from layout through fitting and assembly.

steps.title: Erection
steps.body: Our erection crews work to strict safety protocols on site. We have experience with industrial buildings, warehouses, mezzanines, office structures, and special steel work at any scale.
steps.imageAlt: Steel erection inside an industrial shell

steps.title: Cladding
steps.body: We install metal roof and wall systems tailored to site conditions and performance needs for daylighting and insulation. We work with leading brands and profiles recognized in the market.
steps.imageAlt: Roof and wall cladding over structural steel

steps.title: Coating
steps.body: We apply coating systems matched to each project’s operating environment—from anti-corrosion primer and durable topcoats to hot-dip galvanizing and epoxy or polyurethane systems for severe exposure conditions.

bullets.title: Epoxy and polyurethane
bullets.text: Chemical and UV resistance for long service life.

bullets.title: Custom finish
bullets.text: Color and coating matched to environment and client.

steps.imageAlt: Coating and envelope finishes on industrial structure
